opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole mouth is covered in ulcers and it burns so much I can't even swallow a sip of water. I feel incredibly weak.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe mouth ulcers and lip blisters, can't swallow fluids since yesterday, feeling weak.

symptom_narrative.onset: malaise/mild fever 3 days ago, then lip tingling 48h ago, then blisters/ulcers
symptom_narrative.character: burning grouped blisters on the lips and painful ulcers throughout the mouth and gums
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't swallow saliva/water; weak and lethargic
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: fever, swollen tender glands, drooling to avoid swallowing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before (seems like a first/primary episode)

objective_data_offered.value: grouped blisters and crusts on the lips, red swollen gums, and lots of small painful ulcers on the cheeks and tongue
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot examine the throat/airway

objective_data_offered.value: heart rate ~105, blood pressure 108/68, temperature 38.1; mouth very dry; hasn't drunk since yesterday
